title: 🏷️ IMAGE
data_structure:
```json
[
    {
        name: 'image_provider',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'flickr',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'imageProvider'],
    },
    {
        name: 'external_id',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: '54671993116',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'name',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'Chevrolet Corvette ZR-1 (C4)',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'description',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: null,
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'creator',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'More Cars',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'license',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'CC-BY 4.0',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'tags',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'Chevrolet, Corvette, C4',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'source',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'https://www.flickr.com/photos/more-cars/54671993116/',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'image_url_original',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'https://www.flickr.com/photos/more-cars/54671993116/sizes/o/',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'image_url_xxl',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'https://www.flickr.com/photos/more-cars/54671993116/sizes/4k/',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'image_url_xl',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: null,
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'image_url_l',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: null,
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'image_url_m',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: null,
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'image_url_s',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: null,
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'image_url_xs',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: null,
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
]
```
